title: 22G Tussi Ghaint Ho
overview: 22g Tussi Ghaint Ho is a Punjabi comedy film starring Bhagwant Mann, Rupan Bal, Upasana Singh and Canadian YouTuber Jus Reign (Jasmeet Singh). Film is written by Bhagwant Mann himself and is directed by Vishal Parasher.
